title: Chondrosum elatum
taxonomy: Chondrosum elatum is a species of plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It is also known as the Mountain Onion or Wild Onion. Chondrosum elatum is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is a perennial bulbous geophyte that produces white or pink flowers and edible leaves. Chondrosum elatum is a member of the subfamily Allioideae, which includes several other species of onions and garlic.
